g.title: acq.invoice_item:invoice->acq.invoice:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (invoice) REFERENCES acq.invoice(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: acq.invoice_item:purchase_order->acq.purchase_order:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (purchase_order) REFERENCES acq.purchase_order(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL

g.title: acq.invoice_item:fund->acq.fund:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund) REFERENCES acq.fund(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.invoice_item:po_item->acq.po_item:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (po_item) REFERENCES acq.po_item(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
